title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 40
instructions: For each question, listen to the recording and choose the correct answer: A, B or C.

items.context: You hear two friends talking about lost library card.
items.audio_script: Girl: Have you found your library card? You looked worried earlier. || Boy: Not at first. I searched my coat pocket because I remembered using it there, then checked my pencil case, but nobody had seen it. || Girl: So where did it turn up? || Boy: My receptionist has just messaged me. [1]It is on the school reception desk[/1]. I must have left it there. I will collect it at lunch because I need it for borrowing a book today. || Girl: Great. You can stop searching now and concentrate on the day.
items.question: Where is the library card?
items.explanation: The speaker says the library card is on the school reception desk.

items.context: You hear two friends talking about buying a birthday present.
items.audio_script: Girl: Did you buy a birthday present for my parents? You said you were going into town after school. || Boy: Yes, but choosing took a while. I first considered a framed photograph, because that seemed a safe choice. || Girl: What about a restaurant voucher? That might have been useful. || Boy: I looked at that, but it did not seem right. In the end, [1]I bought a travel guide because they are planning a holiday soon[/1]. || Girl: That sounds thoughtful. I am sure it will be appreciated. || Boy: I hope so. I will wrap it this evening before tomorrow's party.
items.question: What did the speaker buy?
items.explanation: The speaker says they bought a travel guide because they are planning a holiday soon.

items.context: You hear two people talking about helping at the community centre.
items.audio_script: Woman: What job are you doing at the community centre this afternoon? I thought you were going to paint a sign. || Man: That was yesterday's plan, but somebody finished it before lunch. || Woman: So will you sell cakes instead? || Man: No, the manager says that is not needed today. [1]I have to arrange the prizes on a table because the games begin after lunch[/1]. || Woman: That sounds manageable, although you may be busy. || Man: Yes, I want to finish before five because I promised to meet my friends afterwards nearby.
items.question: What job will the speaker do?

options.C: Arrange the prizes on a table

items.explanation: The speaker says they have to arrange the prizes on a table because the games begin after lunch.

items.context: You hear two students talking about what to take on the swimming lesson.
items.audio_script: Girl: Are you ready for the swimming lesson tomorrow? I was checking what we have to bring, because I do not want to forget anything. || Boy: I was going to pack a cap. Do we need that? || Girl: No, it is not on the list. || Boy: Perhaps I should take trainers instead. || Girl: You can, but [1]everyone must bring a towel because the pool does not provide them anymore[/1]. || Boy: Thanks for reminding me. I will put it in my bag tonight, so I am ready when we leave.
items.question: What must the student take?
items.explanation: The speaker says everyone must bring a towel because the pool does not provide them anymore.

items.context: You hear two friends making plans.
items.audio_script: Woman: Are we still planning to play football on Friday afternoon? I had already arranged everything for it. || Man: I am afraid not. The pitch is muddy and the pool closes early, so that plan will not work now. || Woman: We could go swimming instead. Would that be easier? || Man: I thought about that, but I have a better idea. [1]Let us play tennis on Friday afternoon instead[/1]. || Woman: Fine with me. Where shall we meet? || Man: Meet me by the bus stop at four, and bring your student card in case they ask for it.
items.question: What will they do?
items.explanation: The speaker suggests that they play tennis on Friday afternoon instead.

items.context: You hear two students talking about parents' meeting.
items.audio_script: Girl: Do you know where parents' meeting is being held today? I was going to the school hall, where we usually meet. || Boy: Do not go there. The projector failed in the hall and the dining room is being cleaned, so the organiser changed the room. || Girl: I wondered whether it might be in the dining room. || Boy: No, that is not right either. [1]We need to meet in the music room this afternoon[/1]. || Girl: Thanks for telling me. I would have waited in the wrong place. || Boy: I will message the others too, so nobody misses the beginning.
items.question: Where will parents' meeting be held?
items.explanation: The speaker says they need to meet in the music room.

items.context: You hear two people talking about something that is broken.
items.audio_script: Girl: I heard something is wrong, but I am not sure what it is. Is it the chain? || Boy: No, I checked that earlier and it is working normally. || Girl: Then perhaps it is the light. || Boy: I thought so too, but that is fine. [1]The problem is the front tyre because it is completely flat[/1]. || Girl: We should tell someone before it gets worse or causes trouble. || Boy: I agree. I will explain what happened when Dad gets home this evening and ask if it can be repaired soon.
items.question: What is wrong with the bicycle?
items.explanation: The speaker says the problem is the front tyre because it is completely flat.
